messages.content: how is the winner of the last mundial
The winner of the last FIFA World Cup was Germany in 2014.
how is the winner at Qatar World Cup in 2022?

The winner of the FIFA World Cup in Qatar in 2022 will be decided after the final match of the tournament. As of now, France is the current holder of the World Cup, having won the tournament in 2018. It's still too early to predict who will win the 2022 World Cup as the tournament isn't scheduled to take place for another four years.
